headline: Air Products Deepens Samsung Ties With Pyeongtaek Semiconductor Gas Megaproject
summary: Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE:APD) has signed a major new long term contract to supply industrial gases to Samsung's advanced semiconductor fab in Pyeongtaek, South Korea. The agreement marks Air Products' largest investment in the semiconductor sector to date. The Pyeongtaek facility is expected to become Air Products' largest global operations site. For investors following NYSE:APD, this agreement links a core industrial gases business directly to one of the most capital intensive...
